ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "indicator_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data point is associated with */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data point */,
  "data_quality_rating" REAL /* Data quality rating for the data point */,
  "data_source_link" TEXT /* Direct link to the data source for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "UN_region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the UN regions table */,
  "OECD_region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the OECD regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_OECD_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("OECD_region_id") REFERENCES OECD_regions ("OECD_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_UN_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("UN_region_id") REFERENCES UN_regions ("UN_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "UN_regions" (
  "UN_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UN region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the UN region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("UN_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "OECD_regions" (
  "OECD_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OECD region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the OECD region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("OECD_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data point was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., data source, methodology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_categories" (
  "data_source_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "data_source_link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the original data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
